title: [codereview-p2 pass3] schema and test_vectors.py coverage gap for new now/select_channel fields
description: File: test/vectors/schema.json and python/tests/test_vectors.py:79. ccp_load_balancing.json schema does not define fields for blacklist_until, last_used, last_switch_ts, per-channel snr/per, MIN_* constants. test_vector_file_schema only does schema check; no parametrized test for select_channel oracle like _schc_cases(). Update schema for format_version, add full test function exercising pseudocode. Matches project-LICHEN-zlw5. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-stvs
close_reason: Added ccp16.json to test_vector_file_schema, _ccp coverage for new fields in test_vectors.py. No dead code. Full CCP-15 coverage with test_vectors run.
